title: Society and Social Interaction
summary: This chapter was merged into Florida Chapter 3: Culture and Society. See Chapter 3 for a detailed comparison of what content was retained, modified, or removed from the merger of Chapters 3 and 4.

changes.original_text: Chapter 4: Society and Social Interaction was merged into Florida Chapter 3 (Culture and Society). The standalone chapter on social interaction was eliminated.
changes.context: Entire chapter merged with Chapter 3. See Chapter 3 comparison for details on what content survived the merger.
